description: Committing real secret values into values.yaml so they render into manifests and git.
body: Failure mode: credentials are placed directly in values.yaml (or a committed values file) so they end up in version control and in every rendered manifest and release secret. Detection signals: secret literals in the chart's values files, the rendered Secret manifest contains real credentials, and the values are in git history. Do not store real secrets in chart values. Safer fallback: reference secrets from an external manager (External Secrets, sealed-secrets, or a values file injected at deploy time and never committed), keep placeholders in the chart, and treat any committed secret as a leak to rotate.
